---
title: "Emily Peters"
about:
  template: trestles  # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: img/profile.png
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://instagram.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/petersemily/petersemily.github.io
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: https://GITHUB_USERNAME.github.io/resume-example.pdf
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:emp21@geneseo.edu

---


Emily Peters majors in Data Analytics at SUNY Geneseo. 

## Education

Genesee Community College | Batavia, NY

State University of New York at Geneseo | Geneseo, NY <br>
B.S. in Data Analytics | Jan 2023 - present <br>
Minor in Mathematics
